name: Craft: Warped Hauler's Harness Mk II
description:
Completing this mission unlocks a new item crafting recipe.

Craft the Ideal of Exercise from experimental materials and miscellaneous parts.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

EFFECT: Unlock ability to craft an upgraded warped hauler's harness mk II.

effect.u_message:
You find that your harness is lacking and desire to carry heavier things in it.
A new recipe has been learned.  Craft this artifact to permanently unlock a new item recipe.

EFFECT: Unlock ability to craft an upgraded warped hauler's harness mk II.
You have demonstrated your ability and desire to pick up heavy things.

Your mind expands.  You have learned to craft:
warped hauler's harness mk II

description:
This strange metaphysical artifact will empower you and unlock a new crafting recipe.  Will be used automatically upon crafting, and can only be used once.

ASSOCIATED UPGRADE: Warped Hauler's Harness Mk II
